rerun0.23.0-alpha.1+dev

In rerun::dataframe::external::re_chunk::external::arrow::compute

rerun::dataframe::external::re_chunk::external::arrow::compute

Function using_chrono_tz_and_utc_naive_date_time

pub fn using_chrono_tz_and_utc_naive_date_time(
    tz: &str,
    utc: NaiveDateTime,
) -> Option<FixedOffset>
👎Deprecated: Use arrow_array::timezone::Tz instead
Expand description

Parse the given string into a string representing fixed-offset that is correct as of the given UTC NaiveDateTime.

Note that the offset is function of time and can vary depending on whether daylight savings is in effect or not. e.g. Australia/Sydney is +10:00 or +11:00 depending on DST.
